dialogue_tree.greeting: Welcome, young adventurer. I can sense your potential. If you have reached level 8, I can guide you to your destiny. What vocation calls to you? Say {knight}, {paladin}, {sorcerer}, or {druid}.
dialogue_tree.farewell: May your path be true. Farewell.

knight.text: A Knight is a master of melee combat, with the highest health and carrying capacity. Do you wish to become a Knight? Say {yes} to confirm.

paladin.text: A Paladin is a holy warrior skilled in distance fighting and moderate magic. Do you wish to become a Paladin? Say {yes} to confirm.

sorcerer.text: A Sorcerer wields devastating offensive magic, with the highest mana pool. Do you wish to become a Sorcerer? Say {yes} to confirm.

druid.text: A Druid is a master of nature and healing magic, with great mana reserves. Do you wish to become a Druid? Say {yes} to confirm.

vocation.text: I can guide you to become a {knight}, {paladin}, {sorcerer}, or {druid}. Which path interests you?

job.text: I am The Oracle. I guide young adventurers to their vocations when they reach level 8.
